g.text: The Story in One View: Unity of Effort under Agentic Autonomy
AI-Assisted Development as Dominant Production Mode
Autonomy at Agentic Velocity Threatens Unity of Effort
AI Code Generation Volume Outpaces Architectural Planning and Review Capacity
Centralized Governance Cannot Scale to Concurrent Development Contexts
Achieve Unity of Effort Across Autonomous, Agentic SDLC Work
Speed Up Architectural Planning & Governance for Agentic Work
Plan Collaboratively in a Unified, Staged Repository System
Provide Independent Read-Access to Architecture for Teams & Agents
Enable Fast Feedback from Implementation to Architecture
